---
title: "Week of March 1st Goals"
author: "Aarthi Bharathan"
date: "2026-03-05"
categories: [Weekly Goals]
description: "March 1st Week"
image: ""
---

# Overview

Week of March 1st

## March 5th Post

### Computational Work

Compressed the data into 70% and 90% identity matches to filter and identify distant relatives to the reference sequence that contribute to the diversity in the lineage. This was done in today's lab meeting. We made a python script and a bash script to compress all the fasta files that were stored in the query_dir directory on the HPC scr10 space.  cd-hit was used to merge related sequences.
